rawAssistant:
Tomorrow's work'll be busy, but I can squeeze you in for a tightening. Don't expect it to be quick, mind – roads don't mend themselves. You're right to think ahead, though; dawn's when most folks are on the move. Double-check your bedroll and twine: if they weren't secure before, they might not stay that way in the wind.

If you're leaving early, I'd also recommend a quick check of your charms – especially those road kit ones. You don't want any surprises along the way.
